data.name: MappingSelectColumnHint
data.value: Select a column on the left, or click Add to create one.

data.name: MappingExternalNameDescription
data.value: Column name in the external file, written to the header row on export. Import matches columns by position, so this is a display name.

data.name: MappingFieldDescription
data.value: Source/target of the value, in 'FieldName.DataMember' format (e.g. Customer.Value). Leave empty to ignore the column on import and write the fixed value on export.

data.name: MappingFixedValueDescription
data.value: Written as-is on export (e.g. a partner code). Used for columns that have no field.

data.name: MappingCodeConversionDescription
data.value: Maps external codes to internal values using a conversion table, which is a normal business module. Export converts internal to external, import converts external to internal. External codes not found in the table are reported as row errors on import.
